summary: Tested dead stock / aging filter routing feature. All 9 test cases passed. The inventory page correctly filters by ?aging=dead and ?aging=slow URL params. Banner, clear filter, empty states, and Reports page KPI navigation all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: 2 dead stock vehicles already existed in DB (Honda Dio 285d and 77d aged)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dead stock aging filter feature fully validated. Test data: 2 actual dead stock vehicles (Honda Dio) exist in DB so ?aging=dead shows real data. ?aging=slow correctly returns 0 results (no 46-60 day vehicles). Reports inventory tab shows dead stock table (not empty state). All navigation flows work.

test_results.inventory_dead_filter_banner: PASS - Red banner 'Showing: Dead Stock (60+ days) — available vehicles only' displays correctly
test_results.inventory_dead_filter_results: PASS - Shows 2 dead stock vehicles (285d and 77d, both AVAILABLE status)
test_results.inventory_clear_filter_banner: PASS - Clear filter button removes banner and restores all 5 vehicles
test_results.inventory_slow_filter_results: PASS - 0 results with correct empty state (no 46-60d vehicles)
test_results.inventory_regular_works: PASS - /inventory without params shows all 5 vehicles, no banner
test_results.reports_dead_kpi_navigation: PASS - Dead Stock KPI card navigates to /inventory?aging=dead
test_results.reports_slow_kpi_navigation: PASS - Slow Moving KPI card navigates to /inventory?aging=slow
test_results.reports_dead_stock_table_rows_clickable: PASS - Dead stock table rows navigate to /inventory/{vehicle_id}
